misc: Always a gentleman despite occasionally losing his temper on the course
biography: Hailing from Oulujokilaakson Golfklubi ry, Daniel has established himself as a dedicated participant in the esteemed Hector Trophée, having made seven previous appearances in this distinctive pair competition.

Daniel's competitive record is marked by significant success within the team format, as he has hoisted the coveted Hector Trophée with his partner on two separate occasions. These triumphs underscore his formidable ability to forge effective partnerships and deliver under pressure. While his team prowess is clear, the individual Victor Trophy, an accolade for the top solo performer, has thus far remained an objective he continues to pursue.

On the course, Daniel is widely recognized for his unwavering sportsmanship, always conducting himself as a true gentleman. This steadfast demeanor, however, can occasionally give way to moments of intense frustration, as he is known to lose his temper on rare occasions, a vivid display of his deep-seated competitive fire. This captivating contrast between his innate civility and his passionate outbursts adds a unique dimension to his presence.

Although Daniel will not be among the competitors for the Hector Trophée 2026, he remains an active participant in other Hector events. His impressive history, marked by team victories and an enduring commitment to the game, suggests that any future return to the Trophée's challenging fairways would be keenly anticipated, as he continues his quest for individual distinction.
